The '''Lakefresh Restaurant''' was located in the boom-town settlement of [[Roaring Crater]] on [[Tasariq]]. Its most notable menu item was perhaps the fresh [[Fish/Legends|fish]] caught from [[Echo Lake]].<ref name="J15" />
